title: Invisible Item Frames
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/im9N8O2N/images/bd8f50e394fd4b99abd42290c5cc225e2bb40d59.png)
[![License: GPL v3](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-GPLv3-blue.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0)
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21-green?style=for-the-badge)
[![Ko-Fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-F16061?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/tayacrystals)
[![https://taya.one](https://img.shields.io/badge/Made%20by-Taya-ee82ee?style=for-the-badge)](https://taya.one)

Adds craftable invisible item frames to minecraft

Invisible Item frames will stay visible until you put a item inside, so you don't lose them

## Crafting Recipe
Add a glass pane to a Item Frame or a Glow Item Frame to convert it to an invisible one

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/im9N8O2N/images/d256fd4d2454af01f5429401f3db6a5b026f09df.png)
